title: Obama, Clinton to show up − and shore up $25M − as Biden looks to unite Dems
shortDescription: The rare showing of three presidents presents a united Democratic front for Joe Biden and will haul in at least $25 million for the Biden campaign.

title: Who Is Mike Johnson? Why did Marjorie Taylor Greene push to oust him?
shortDescription: Speaker of the House Mike Johnson faces a dilemma – bend to the will of Marjorie Taylor Greene or face being ousted like his predecessor.

title: Abortion rights advocates eye almost a dozen state ballots in 2024
shortDescription: Advocates for abortion access hope to continue their winning streak in these states, including key election battlegrounds, with citizens initiatives.

title: Election 2024 calendar: Important dates to watch ahead of Election Day
shortDescription: With President Joe Biden and former president Donald Trump obtaining enough delegates to secure their respective party's nominations, the rematch is set.

title: Appeals court keeps Texas' immigration law on hold under new ruling
shortDescription: In the Tuesday night decision, the court walked through a number of issues it must contend with in ruling on the law, which will be heard on April 3.

title: California judge recommends disbarment for Trump lawyer John Eastman
shortDescription: A California judge recommended disbarring John Eastman, one of Donald Trump's lawyers baselessly challenging the 2020 election results.

title: RNC organizers have asked job applicants whether the 2020 election was stolen
shortDescription: As Donald Trump tightens his grip on national Republicans, RNC organizers are asking applicants if they think the 2020 election was stolen.

title: What is the 'God Bless the USA Bible' Trump, Lee Greenwood are selling?
shortDescription: The "God Bless the USA Bible" is being sold by Trump and Lee Greenwood for $59.99 a piece amidst Trump's mounting legal bills.

title: Trump NY criminal hush money trial in photos
shortDescription: Trump faces 34 felony counts including falsifying business records to cover up a hush money payment to adult film actress Stormy Daniels.

title: Biden to Gaza protesters, 'They have a point'
shortDescription: Demonstrators interjected themselves into President Joe Biden's speech on health care costs, protesting the war in Gaza.

title: Who was Jeanette Rankin, the first woman elected to Congress
shortDescription: The first woman in Congress was sworn in more than three years before women got the right to vote in the U.S. Here's how the suffragette got there.

title: Who was the first woman in Congress? How she made history.
shortDescription: The first woman in Congress was sworn in more than three years before women got the right to vote in the U.S. Here's how the suffragette got there.

title: A Georgia man has a tool to challenge voter rolls. Trump allies want to use it.
shortDescription: EagleAI set off alarm bells among experts who say government workers will be inundated with voter challenges ahead of the 2024 election.
